final_text:
The log files were analyzed based on the reference date of 2025-08-12. The counts for each severity (ERROR, WARNING, INFO) were calculated for the specified periods (today, last 7 days, last 30 days, month to date, and total) and saved to `/app/summary.csv`.

The contents of `/app/summary.csv` are:
```csv
period,severity,count
today,ERROR,414
today,WARNING,463
today,INFO,1433
last_7_days,ERROR,3559
last_7_days,WARNING,4020
last_7_days,INFO,12203
last_30_days,ERROR,11432
last_30_days,WARNING,12847
last_30_days,INFO,38702
month_to_date,ERROR,5594
month_to_date,WARNING,6327
month_to_date,INFO,19420
total,ERROR,16774
total,WARNING,18772
total,INFO,56621
```
